findings.notes: VACUUM INTO is a SQLite-specific snapshot mechanism; Turso/libSQL lacks this — must replace with serialize()/file-copy or Turso snapshot API
VACUUM INTO on attached shard — Turso cannot attach databases or VACUUM INTO; snapshot strategy must change entirely
Turso/libSQL driver lacks .pragma() method; busy_timeout must be set via connection string or config
WAL/SHM sidecar cleanup assumes local SQLite file model; Turso remote databases have no sidecar files

findings.signature: fs.renameSync + fs.copyFileSync file-swap restore with journal
findings.notes: v2 restore is entirely file-copy based (rename live→backup, copy snapshot→live); Turso remote DB cannot fs.copyFileSync — needs API-level restore
FTS5 delete-all command; Turso/libSQL has no FTS5 — must replace with external search or Trigram/other index

findings.signature: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS prevent_ledger_update BEFORE UPDATE ON mutation_ledger
findings.notes: BEFORE UPDATE/DELETE triggers for append-only enforcement; Turso supports triggers but verify compatibility
SAVEPOINT-based merge-restore atomicity; verify Turso/libSQL driver supports SAVEPOINT in remote mode

findings.signature: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type IN ('table','view')
findings.notes: Direct sqlite_master queries for table existence; Turso may require information_schema or different catalog
Used to resolve attached shard paths; Turso cannot ATTACH databases — sharding model must change
Foreign key pragma toggle around DDL transaction; Turso driver lacks .pragma() — use SQL SET or connection config

findings.signature: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS memory_fts USING fts5(...) + triggers + rebuild
findings.notes: Full FTS5 virtual table creation with content-sync triggers and rebuild; Turso has no FTS5 or loadExtension — blocks schema downgrade path
Large sweep transaction with TOCTOU re-validation, DELETE + governance audit + history + ledger; verify Turso transaction semantics for long-running writes
Three pragma calls for vacuum and WAL checkpoint post-delete maintenance; Turso has no .pragma() and no WAL — must remove or replace with Turso compaction API
FTS5 optimize command after bulk deletes; Turso has no FTS5 — must remove or replace

findings.signature: db.transaction(() => { INSERT INTO memory_index + INSERT INTO vec_memories + supersedes edge })
findings.notes: Complex merge transaction: retire predecessor, insert merged row, insert vector, insert causal edge, BM25 update — all in one sync transaction

findings.signature: db.transaction(() => { SELECT + UPDATE memory_index + UPDATE vec_memories })
findings.notes: Compare-and-swap pattern inside sync transaction; Turso remote transactions may have different latency/locking semantics

findings.signature: ALTER TABLE memory_index ADD COLUMN bm25_repair_needed INTEGER DEFAULT 0
findings.notes: Online ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN; Turso supports this but verify default value handling in remote mode
Manual BEGIN IMMEDIATE transaction control for cadence bookkeeping; Turso remote driver may not support raw exec('BEGIN') — use driver transaction API

findings.signature: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS consolidation_state + INSERT ... ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE
findings.notes: Upsert cadence state table; Turso supports UPSERT but verify in remote mode with BEGIN IMMEDIATE
